summary: Operators of the Russian "Rubicon" Center reported 144 targets destroyed on April 4, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and UAV control points, with similar operations the previous day resulting in 118 hits. In Taganrog, a drone and missile attack damaged commercial warehouses and a vessel in Taganrog Bay, with fires localized and evacuations carried out. Ukrainian forces, in coordination with the Defense Intelligence of Ukraine, struck an enemy UAV storage facility, an aircraft, and a radar station in occupied Crimea on April 2, targeting Orion-type drones valued at over $5 million each. The Russian military is experimenting with "Drone Line" defensive concepts, while Ukrainian forces have deployed "Gerbera" drones for psychological operations, dropping fake money with QR codes in border regions.
